import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a Profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/profiles/{profileId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes the Profile and cancels all scheduled windows.
In-flight `WindowInstance` records are preserved for audit purposes.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
